title: Resolve Beads Dolt remote divergence before next sync
description: bd dolt push fails with: push to origin/main: Error 1105: unknown push error; no common ancestor. The tool reports local and remote Dolt histories have diverged and offers bootstrap, force push, or manual reinitialization. Operator must choose authoritative history before Beads state can be safely pushed.
close_reason: Operator decision: treat .beads/issues.jsonl as source of truth; exported Beads state to JSONL for git-tracked sync instead of Dolt remote sync.

title: Tag eino-providers v0.1.0 after all release gates pass

Verify local-symphony green against local replace of eino-providers for one PR cycle
notes: Verification attempted with temporary go.localreplace.mod replacing github.com/mattsp1290/eino-providers to /home/infra-admin/.mux/529455aa-3416-4552-804a-037823755d13/eino-providers. go test -modfile=go.localreplace.mod ./... failed before any provider adoption signal: internal/worker TestRunAfterRunRunsEvenOnAgentFailure failed because sh reported '[[: not found', and internal/worker/tools/shell tests timed out at 30-60s with empty stdout. The run continued for several minutes after failures and was killed; temporary mod files were removed. This appears unrelated to eino-providers and needs local-symphony operator follow-up before this release gate can be marked green.

title: Add CI benchmark gate for Gemini 18 allocs 912 bytes with 2x regression limit

title: Add CI gate proving claude openai gemini ollama do not depend on codex-auth-go
close_reason: Added scripts/check-dep-leaks.sh, which creates throwaway consumer modules for claude, openai, gemini, and ollama with a replace to the local repo and fails if go list -deps includes github.com/mattsp1290/codex-auth-go. Added the script to CI after tests. Verified scripts/check-dep-leaks.sh, go test ./..., go mod tidy, git diff --check, and golangci-lint v2 run.

title: Lift ollama NewChatModel Config and parseKeepAlive from local-symphony
close_reason: Added ollama package with Config, NewChatModel delegation to github.com/cloudwego/eino-ext/components/model/ollama v0.1.9, BaseURL/Model/Timeout validation, and keep_alive parsing lifted from local-symphony. Added tests for construction validation and parseKeepAlive behavior. Verified go test ./..., golangci-lint v2 run, go mod tidy, and ollama dependency graph does not include codex-auth-go.

title: Lift ollama PingOllama health probe with capped timeout and ErrBackendUnreachable
close_reason: Added ollama PingOllama probing GET /api/tags with path-prefix preservation, query dropping, credential-scrubbed errors, response draining, capped timeout wrapper, and ollama.ErrBackendUnreachable alias to root ErrBackendUnreachable. NewChatModel now runs the capped health probe before constructing. Added health tests covering success, proxy paths, query dropping, credential scrubbing, non-2xx, timeout/sentinel wrapping, and bad inputs. Verified go test ./... and golangci-lint v2 run.

title: Lift gemini provider package with cached genai client optional GenaiClient and init registration
close_reason: Added gemini package with Provider, cached genai.Client construction, NewGeminiProvider, NewGeminiProviderWithClient, Options.GenaiClient reuse in registry constructor, Advise implementation using Eino Gemini MaxTokens pointer, ExtractUsage, WrapInitError on chat-model construction, and init registration under provider name gemini. Added constructor and registry reuse tests. Verified go test ./..., go mod tidy, and golangci-lint v2 run.

title: Lift openai provider package using MaxCompletionTokens BaseURL string and init registration

title: Lift claude provider package with constructors BaseURL handling Advise and init registration
close_reason: Added claude package with Provider, advisor-compatible constructors, BaseURL handling, optional HTTPClient forwarding from Options, Advise implementation using Eino Claude, ExtractUsage, WrapInitError on construction, and init registration under provider name claude. Added constructor and registry tests. Verified go test ./..., go mod tidy, and golangci-lint v2 run.

title: Implement root NewProvider dispatch through registry without backend imports
close_reason: Added factory.go NewProvider dispatching only through lookupProvider, returning ErrUnknownProvider-wrapped errors when no backend is registered. Verified go test ./..., golangci-lint v2 run, and no root Go file imports backend subpackages.

title: Implement registry.go RegisterProvider lookup mutex and duplicate panic
close_reason: Implemented registry.go with ProviderCtor, mutex-protected constructor map, RegisterProvider validation, duplicate panic, and unexported lookupProvider. Added registry tests for lookup, duplicate panic, empty name, and nil constructor. Verified go test ./... and golangci-lint v2 run.

title: Implement options.go unified Options with pointer fields and doc comments
close_reason: Implemented options.go with unified Options fields: APIKey, BaseURL *string, MaxTokens *int, KeepAlive *time.Duration, HTTPClient *http.Client, and GenaiClient *genai.Client, with field-name and backend semantics docs. Verified go test ./... and golangci-lint v2 run.

title: Implement errors.go sentinels wrappers WrapInitError and Classify
close_reason: Implemented errors.go with provider sentinels, ErrorClass enum, Classify, WrapInitError/initErr, and WrapAuthError/authErr preserving cause Error strings with sentinel-first Unwrap ordering. Verified go test ./... and golangci-lint v2 run.

title: Lift provider.go with Provider Usage and nil-safe ExtractUsage
close_reason: Added provider.go in package einoproviders with Provider, Usage, and exported nil-safe ExtractUsage. Added github.com/cloudwego/eino v0.8.13. Verified go test ./... and golangci-lint v2 run.

title: Choose exact eino and eino-ext version pins for v0.1.0
close_reason: Decision: pin core github.com/cloudwego/eino to v0.8.13 for v0.1.0. Per-backend eino-ext pins follow the canonical plan and current source baselines: claude v0.1.17, openai v0.1.13, gemini v0.1.30, ollama v0.1.9. local-symphony Phase 0 was already bumped to eino v0.8.13.

title: Resolve Classify error API shape as enum helper or errors.Is only
close_reason: Decision: include Classify(err) ErrorClass in v0.1.0 alongside errors.Is sentinels. The helper returns a switch-friendly enum for provider init, timeout, API, auth, backend unreachable, unknown provider, and unknown classes while preserving sentinel checks for callers that prefer errors.Is.

title: Resolve Options BaseURL pointer versus string shape before v0.1.0
close_reason: Decision: keep Options.BaseURL as *string for v0.1.0 so nil unambiguously means default endpoint and backends can validate forbidden BaseURL use, especially openai-codex. ADR follow-up can capture the tradeoff before release.

title: Resolve AuthMode routing API: consumer Options versus lifted advisor env seam
close_reason: Decision: do not lift advisor's environment-variable auth-mode seam into eino-providers. Consumers resolve auth mode in their own config layer and call/register the desired backend name, e.g. openai or openai-codex. This keeps Options focused on construction inputs and avoids hidden env reads in a shared library.

close_reason: Added go.mod declaring module github.com/mattsp1290/eino-providers with Go 1.25.5; go mod tidy passes; go test ./... has no packages yet.

Full go test ./... was interrupted after unit packages passed because later integration-style packages produced no output for over a minute.

title: Prepare codex-auth-go API surface for HTTPClient and auth sentinels
notes: Human/operator needed: the available codex-auth-go worktree at /home/infra-admin/.mux/3191d790-c4b4-448c-b700-f25af9eba6ed/codex-auth-go already has uncommitted partial lift changes (README/go.mod/.github/.gitignore edits, deleted go.sum, untracked source/test files). Do not proceed from eino-providers until an operator confirms whether to continue that worktree, switch worktrees, or preserve those changes.
close_reason: codex-auth-go now exposes the API surface needed by openaicodex: package-level HTTPClient(ctx), Client.HTTPClient(ctx), ErrNotLoggedIn, ErrPlanNotIncluded, ErrQuotaExceeded, and ErrRefreshFailed. Added missing sentinels in codex-auth-go commit bf0cd92 and verified go test ./... there before pushing.

Advisor migration delete lifted provider factory and backend files
notes: Blocked by migration ordering: deleting advisor's lifted provider/factory files before updating call sites would break advisor. The current graph has eino-providers-kel blocking eino-providers-isf, but the safe order appears to be the reverse: update advisor call sites to einoproviders first, then delete the old internal provider/factory files. Needs human confirmation or graph correction before implementation.
